//: M03 (Dev Spaces & the Inner Loop): che-code prompts to install these on first open so the debug exercise works. redhat.java = Language Support for Java; vscjava.vscode-java-debug = Debugger for Java. Both verified present in the workshop cluster's EMBEDDED Open VSX registry (2026-07-10). Never recommend vscjava.vscode-java-pack here: the meta-pack is ABSENT from the embedded registry (404) and its install would fail. If a cluster's registry is offline entirely, the GUI debug step falls back to the jdb terminal path in the lab.
